scripts.bootstrap: npm run bootstrap:frontend && npm run bootstrap:scanner && npm run bootstrap:backend-python && npm run bootstrap:rust
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:scanner && npm run build:rust
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:scanner
scripts.lint:frontend: cd frontend && npm run lint || echo "(adicione lint no frontend se quiser)"
scripts.test: npm run test:python && npm run test:rust
scripts.test:python: pytest backend/tests || echo "ajuste os testes conforme necessário"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently "cd backend && uvicorn server:app --reload" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.start:prod: echo "Suba uvicorn + build do frontend atrás do nginx/openresty"
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.doctor: echo "Verifique .env, portas e binários (node, python, cargo, php)"
